nasb.text: And he was reasoning in the synagogue every Sabbath and trying to persuade Jews and Greeks.

esv.text: And he reasoned in the synagogue every Sabbath, and tried to persuade Jews and Greeks.

cnv.text: 每逢安息日，保羅在會堂辯論，勸導猶太人和希臘人歸主。

ccb.text: 保罗每个安息日都到会堂与犹太人和希腊人辩论，劝导他们信主。

csbs.text: 每逢安息日，保罗就在会堂里讲论，劝导犹太人和希腊人。
